title: pyrenaria khasiana var. khasiana
intro: Pyrenaria khasiana var. khasiana, also known as Himalayan Pyrenaria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pyrenaria khasiana var. khasiana include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections. In traditional medicine, the plant is used to prepare various herbal remedies, including decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are applied topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
